title: Reject over-long URLs on /shorten with 400 + JSON error
intent: Reject overly long URLs on the shorten endpoint with a 400 + JSON error so the store never persists garbage.
acceptance: POST /shorten with a url longer than MAX_URL_LEN returns 400 with a JSON { error } body and stores nothing; a normal url returns 201 with a code. The acceptance ORACLE is a request-contract (NOT 429) — its whole purpose is to prove the harness eval is scenario-declared, not rate-limit-baked.
status: LOOP 2 — deterministic breadth + LIVE CAPSTONE candidate
